get.description: Fetches metadata for CRM modules including configuration, capabilities, and structural information. Supports filtering by feature name to retrieve modules associated with specific features, or by status (e.g., `system_hidden`) to return modules matching that status. When both `status` and `feature_name` are provided, modules must satisfy both criteria (AND logic). Expected latency: ~60ms.

200.description: Successfully retrieved module metadata. Returns an array of module objects containing configuration details, permissions, fields, layouts, and related lists for each module. No pagination is applied; all matching modules are returned in a single response.

schema.description: Response containing an array of module metadata objects with complete configuration details.

modules.description: Array of module metadata objects, each containing complete configuration including fields, layouts, profiles, and permissions.

items.description: Complete metadata for a single CRM module including configuration, capabilities, fields, layouts, profiles, and related lists.

global_search_supported.description: Whether the module supports global search functionality.

public_fields_configured.description: Whether public fields have been configured for this module.

recycle_bin_on_delete.description: Whether deleted records are moved to the recycle bin instead of being permanently deleted.

has_more_profiles.description: Whether more profiles exist beyond those currently loaded (pagination indicator).

sub_menu_available.description: Whether a submenu is available for this module in the navigation.

lookupable.description: Whether the module supports lookup functionality and can be used as a lookup target in other modules.

profile_count.description: Number of profiles associated with this module. 0 indicates no profile assignments.

module_type.description: Type classification of the module. Only exposed for pathfinder and orchestration modules.

cc_enabled.description: Whether CommandCenter functionality is enabled for email communications. Only exposed for orchestration module (not API-supported).

deletable.description: Whether records in this module can be deleted by users.

description.description: User-defined description of the module's purpose.

creatable.description: Whether new records can be created in this module.

inventory_template_supported.description: Whether inventory templates are supported for this module.

modified_time.description: Timestamp when the module was last modified (timezone-aware).

presence_sub_menu.description: Whether the module has a presence submenu option.

triggers_supported.description: Whether workflow triggers are supported for this module.

id.description: Unique identifier for the module.

api_name.description: API identifier for the module; follows naming convention (starts with letter, alphanumeric and underscores only).

plural_label.description: Plural display label for the module; if translation is enabled, contains the translated label, otherwise matches actual_plural_label.

actual_plural_label.description: Original plural label as stored in the database, without translation applied.

actual_singular_label.description: Original singular label as stored in the database, without translation applied.

singular_label.description: Singular display label for the module; if translation is enabled, contains the translated label, otherwise matches actual_singular_label.

isBlueprintSupported.description: Whether the module supports Blueprint (process automation) functionality.

visibility.description: Bitwise feature visibility flags; base value 1 indicates fully visible. Add sums of flags to hide module features: 2=WEBUIHIDDEN, 4=TABMENU, 8=LOOKUP, 16=RELATEDLIST, 32=MULTISELECTLOOKUP, 64=MODULE_SETTING, 128=AUTOMATION, 256=TEMPLATES, 512=IMPORT, 1024=EXPORT, 4096=REPORT, 8192=API. Example: 4612 (4+512+4096) hides TabMenu, Import and Report.

convertable.description: Whether records in this module can be converted to other module types.

editable.description: Whether records in this module can be edited by users.

emailTemplate_support.description: Whether email template functionality is supported for this module.

email_parser_supported.description: Whether email parsing capabilities are supported for this module.

filter_supported.description: Whether filtering functionality is available for records in this module.

show_as_tab.description: Whether the module appears as a tab in the main navigation.

web_link.description: URL for web tab modules; supports parameter substitution via arguments array.

viewable.description: Whether records in this module can be viewed by users.

api_supported.description: Whether API operations are allowed for this module.

quick_create.description: Whether quick create form is available for this module.

static_subform_properties.description: Configuration properties for static subform modules.

fields.description: Array of field references included in the static subform.

items.description: Field reference object containing API name and ID.

api_name.description: API name of the static subform field.

id.description: Unique identifier for the static subform field.

feeds_required.description: Whether activity feeds are required for this module.

scoring_supported.description: Whether lead/record scoring functionality is supported for this module.

webform_supported.description: Whether web form integration is supported for this module.

arguments.description: Array of argument objects used to substitute parameters in web tab URLs (e.g. https://...&id=${Users.User Id}&name=${Users.First Name}). Duplicates are allowed.

items.description: Argument object defining a URL parameter substitution with name-value pair.

name.description: Argument key used in URL template.

business_card_field_limit.description: Maximum number of business card fields allowed (non-negative).

access_type.description: Access control model for the module.

private_profile.description: Private profile configuration for the module.

name.description: Name of the private profile.

id.description: Unique identifier for the private profile.

track_current_data.description: Whether current data tracking is enabled for this module.

oneOf.description: User who last modified this custom view. Null for system views that have never been modified.

name.description: Name of the user who modified the custom view.

id.description: Unique identifier of the user who modified the custom view.

oneOf.description: Indicates that has never been modified.

profiles.description: List of profiles associated with this module. May be empty for certain module types.

items.description: Profile object containing profile name and unique identifier.

id.description: Unique identifier for the profile.

name.description: Display name of the profile.

parent_module.description: Parent module reference if this is a child/related module. Empty object {} for standalone modules, null in some cases, or populated object with api_name and id for child modules.

api_name.description: API name of the parent module.

id.description: Unique identifier for the parent module.

status.description: Lifecycle/state of the module (e.g. visible to end users, hidden by system/user, or pending deletion). This status is orthogonal to the numeric bitwise feature flags in 'visibility'; it does not itself enable/disable individual features.

sequence_number.description: Display order of the module in the navigation/module list.

name.description: Name of the territory (e.g., 'All Territories' when id is 0).

id.description: Unique identifier for the territory; 0 indicates the special 'All Territories' territory, other values are unique int64 identifiers.

204.description: No content - returned when no modules match the specified filter criteria.

400.description: Bad request due to invalid parameter values. Returned when `status` contains unsupported values or when `feature_name` is provided as an empty string.

oneOf.description: Returned when status parameter contains invalid values

code.description: Error code indicating invalid data in the request.

details.description: Details about the validation error including which parameter failed and valid values.

index.description: Zero-based index of the invalid value in comma-separated status parameter

items.description: A valid status value accepted by the API.

supported_values.description: Unordered list of valid status values. Each value appears exactly once.

param_name.description: Name of the parameter that contains the invalid value

message.description: Human-readable error message describing the validation failure

status.description: Error status indicator. Always 'error' for failed requests.

oneOf.description: Returned when feature_name parameter is empty string

code.description: Error code indicating invalid data in the request.

details.description: Empty object for invalid feature_name

message.description: Human-readable error message describing the validation failure

status.description: Error status indicator. Always 'error' for failed requests.

post.description: Creates a single custom module in the CRM. Requires the Crm_Implied_Customize_Zoho_CRM permission. This operation is not idempotent; submitting the same api_name multiple times will result in validation errors. Only one module can be created per request; batch creation is not supported.

requestBody.description: Request body for creating custom modules in the CRM. Only single module creation is supported per request.

schema.description: Request body for creating a new custom module in Zoho CRM

modules.description: Array containing a single module definition to create. Only one module can be created per request.

items.description: Module definition object containing module metadata, profiles, and optional display field configuration.

singular_label.description: Singular form of the module name. Alphanumeric only, no special characters allowed.

plural_label.description: Plural form of the module name. Alphanumeric only, no special characters allowed.

api_name.description: Unique API identifier for the module. Alphanumeric only, no special characters allowed. Must be unique across all modules.

profiles.description: Array of profile IDs that determine which user profiles can access this module. Must contain at least one profile. Duplicate profile IDs are not allowed.

items.description: Profile access definition

id.description: Numeric string identifier of the user profile. Determines module accessibility for users with this profile.

display_field.description: Defines the primary name field for the module. Optional, but if provided, either field_label or data_type is mandatory. If data_type is 'autonumber', then auto_number configuration with start_number is mandatory.

field_label.description: Label for the name field. Mandatory if display_field is provided and data_type is not specified.

data_type.description: Type of the name field. 'autonumber' for auto-generated sequential IDs (requires auto_number configuration), 'text' for user-entered text. Mandatory if display_field is provided and field_label is not specified.

auto_number.description: Configuration for auto-number generation. Mandatory when data_type is 'autonumber'.

prefix.description: Optional prefix to prepend to the auto-generated number.

start_number.description: Starting number for the auto-number sequence. Must be a numeric string (e.g., '1', '100').

suffix.description: Optional suffix to append to the auto-generated number.

201.description: Successfully created one or more custom modules. Returns the module ID for each created module.

schema.description: Success response containing the created module details

modules.description: Array containing the result of the single module creation request. Always contains exactly one item.

items.description: Module creation result

code.description: Operation status code indicating successful creation

details.description: Contains the unique identifier of the newly created module

id.description: Unique numeric identifier for the created module

message.description: Human-readable success message confirming module creation

400.description: Bad request - validation failure. Returned when input data fails validation (invalid module properties, duplicate api_name, missing required fields, field length exceeded, unsupported operations, or mandatory fields not found). All modules in the batch must be valid; no partial success occurs.

oneOf.description: Batch error format wrapping individual module validation errors in modules array

modules.description: Array of error responses for each module that failed validation

oneOf.description: DUPLICATE_DATA error for duplicate api_name or other unique constraint violations

code.description: Error code indicating duplicate data constraint violation

details.description: Error details with field location information

api_name.description: Name of the field that caused the duplicate error

json_path.description: JSONPath expression locating the duplicate field in the request

message.description: Human-readable error message describing the duplicate data violation

oneOf.description: MANDATORY_NOT_FOUND error when required fields are missing

code.description: Error code indicating a mandatory field is missing

details.description: Error details with field location information

api_name.description: Name of the required field that is missing

json_path.description: JSONPath expression locating where the field should be in the request

message.description: Human-readable error message describing the missing required field

oneOf.description: DEPENDENT_FIELD_MISSING error when dependent configuration is missing

code.description: Error code indicating a dependent field is missing

details.description: Error details with field location information

api_name.description: Name of the dependent field that is missing

json_path.description: JSONPath expression locating where the field should be in the request

message.description: Human-readable error message describing the missing dependent field

oneOf.description: INVALID_DATA error for data validation failures

code.description: Error code indicating invalid or malformed data

details.description: Error details with field information

maximum_length.description: Maximum allowed length for the field

expected_data_type.description: Expected data type for the field

api_name.description: Name of the field with invalid data

json_path.description: JSONPath expression locating the invalid field in the request

message.description: Human-readable error message describing the invalid data

oneOf.description: NOT_ALLOWED error for operations that are not permitted

code.description: Error code indicating operation is not allowed

details.description: Error details with field location information

api_name.description: Name of the field or operation that is not allowed

json_path.description: JSONPath expression locating the not-allowed field or operation

message.description: Human-readable error message explaining what is not allowed

oneOf.description: RESERVED_KEYWORD_NOT_ALLOWED error for reserved system keywords

code.description: Error code indicating use of reserved keyword

details.description: Error details with field location information

api_name.description: Name of the field containing reserved keyword

json_path.description: JSONPath expression locating the field with reserved keyword

message.description: Human-readable error message about the reserved keyword

oneOf.description: API_NOT_SUPPORTED error for version incompatibility

code.description: Error code indicating API version not supported

details.description: Supported version information

message.description: Human-readable error message

oneOf.description: DUPLICATE_DATA error for duplicate field values

code.description: Error code indicating duplicate data constraint violation

details.description: Error details with field location information

api_name.description: Name of the field that caused the duplicate error

json_path.description: JSONPath expression locating the duplicate field in the request

message.description: Human-readable error message

oneOf.description: RESERVED_KEYWORD_NOT_ALLOWED error for using reserved system keywords

code.description: Error code indicating reserved keyword used in field name

details.description: Details about the field using reserved keyword

api_name.description: Name of the field using reserved keyword

json_path.description: JSONPath locating the field

message.description: Human-readable error message

oneOf.description: LIMIT_EXCEEDED error for exceeding module creation limits

code.description: Error code indicating limit exceeded

details.description: Details about the exceeded limit

message.description: Human-readable error message

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid OAuth scope. The OAuth token does not have the required scope to access this endpoint.

schema.description: OAUTH_SCOPE_MISMATCH error when OAuth scope is insufficient

code.description: Error code indicating OAuth scope mismatch

details.description: Additional context about the scope issue

message.description: Human-readable error message

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions. User lacks required permissions to create custom modules.

schema.description: NO_PERMISSION error when user lacks required CRM customization permission

code.description: Error code indicating missing permission

details.description: Details about the missing permissions

permissions.description: List of required permissions that the user lacks

items.description: Required permission identifier

message.description: Human-readable error message

put.description: Updates existing modules in the CRM. Allows modification of module labels and profile assignments. This operation is idempotent; the same request can be safely repeated. Supports batch updates - multiple modules can be updated in a single request. Returns 200 when all modules update successfully, or 207 Multi-Status when some succeed and others fail.

requestBody.description: Request body for updating modules. Supports batch updates - multiple modules can be updated in a single request. Partial updates are supported: only `id` is required; `singular_label`, `plural_label`, and `profiles` are optional and can be updated independently. Profile updates use delta semantics: profiles without `_delete: null` are added (if not already present), profiles with `_delete: null` are removed. Batch updates may result in partial success (207 Multi-Status response) if some modules succeed and others fail.

schema.description: Batch module update request containing an array of modules to update. Supports partial updates where only specified fields are modified.

modules.description: Array of modules to update. Supports batch updates with multiple modules in a single request. Each module must have a unique ID within the request.

items.description: Module update definition containing labels, module ID, and accessible profiles.

singular_label.description: Singular display label for the module (e.g., 'Contact', 'Deal'). Used in UI when referring to a single record. Must contain only alphanumeric characters and underscores, with no consecutive underscores, and cannot be empty.

plural_label.description: Plural display label for the module (e.g., 'Contacts', 'Deals'). Used in UI when referring to multiple records. Must contain only alphanumeric characters and underscores, with no consecutive underscores, and cannot be empty.

id.description: Unique identifier of the module to update. Must be a valid existing module ID.

profiles.description: Optional list of user profiles to add or remove from this module. Uses delta semantics: profiles without `_delete` are added (if not already present), profiles with `_delete: null` are removed. Omit this field to leave profile assignments unchanged. Each profile ID represents a permission set determining which users can view, create, edit, or delete records in this module.

items.description: Profile identifier object.

id.description: Unique numeric identifier of the user profile.

_delete.description: Deletion marker. When set to `null`, this profile will be removed from the module's access list. Omit this field to add or retain the profile.

200.description: Successfully updated all modules in the batch. All requested module updates completed without errors.

schema.description: Successful batch update response containing results for all updated modules. All operations completed successfully without errors.

modules.description: Array of success results for each updated module, preserving request order.

items.description: Successful module update result

code.description: Success code indicating module was updated

details.description: Success details containing the updated module ID

id.description: Unique identifier of the successfully updated module

message.description: Human-readable success message

207.description: Multi-Status - partial success. Returned when batch update contains both successful and failed module updates. Response includes individual status for each module in the request.

schema.description: Multi-status batch update response containing individual results for each module in the request. Results preserve request order and include both successful and failed updates.

modules.description: Array of per-module results preserving request order. Each element represents the outcome for one module update operation.

oneOf.description: Successful module update result

code.description: Success code indicating module was updated

details.description: Success details containing the updated module ID

id.description: Unique identifier of the successfully updated module

message.description: Human-readable success message

oneOf.description: INVALID_DATA error for validation failures

code.description: Error code for invalid data

oneOf.description: Generic invalid field value error

api_name.description: API name of the invalid field

json_path.description: JSONPath location of the invalid field

expected_data_type.description: Expected data type for the field

oneOf.description: Invalid parameter value with supported values

index.description: Zero-based index of the invalid parameter

supported_values.description: List of valid values for the parameter

items.description: A valid value accepted for this parameter

maximum_length.description: Maximum allowed length for the field

api_name.description: API name of the field that exceeded length

json_path.description: JSONPath location of the invalid field

message.description: Human-readable error message

code.description: Error code for missing required field

details.description: Details about the missing required field

api_name.description: API name of the missing required field

json_path.description: JSONPath location where field was expected

message.description: Human-readable error message

400.description: Bad request - validation failure. Returned when input data fails validation (invalid module ID, unsupported field values, field length exceeded, missing required fields, or attempting unsupported operations on system modules). No modules are updated when this error occurs.

schema.description: Validation error response for batch update failures. Returned when all modules in the request fail validation. No modules are updated when this error occurs.

modules.description: Array of error results for each module in the request, preserving request order.

oneOf.description: INVALID_MODULE error for invalid or non-existent module ID

code.description: Error code for invalid module

oneOf.description: Field-level invalid module error

api_name.description: API name of the invalid field

json_path.description: JSONPath location of the invalid module reference

oneOf.description: Resource path index error

resource_path_index.description: Zero-based index of the invalid module in the request array

message.description: Human-readable error message

code.description: Error code for invalid data

oneOf.description: Invalid parameter value with list of supported values

index.description: Zero-based index of the invalid parameter

supported_values.description: List of valid values for the parameter

items.description: A valid value accepted for this parameter

oneOf.description: Field length exceeded error

maximum_length.description: Maximum allowed length for the field

api_name.description: API name of the field that exceeded length

json_path.description: JSONPath location of the invalid field

oneOf.description: Generic invalid field value error

api_name.description: API name of the invalid field

json_path.description: JSONPath location of the invalid field

message.description: Human-readable error message

code.description: Error code for unsupported operation

details.description: Additional error details (typically empty)

message.description: Human-readable error message

oneOf.description: EXPECTED_FIELD_MISSING error for missing expected fields

code.description: Error code for missing expected field

details.description: Details about missing expected fields

expected_fields.description: List of fields that were expected but missing

items.description: Field location details

json_path.description: JSONPath location where field was expected

get.summary: Get module metadata by API name
get.description: Retrieves complete metadata for a specific CRM module identified by its API name. Returns comprehensive configuration including fields, layouts, profiles, related lists, custom views, and module capabilities.

200.description: Successfully retrieved module metadata. Returns complete module configuration including fields, layouts, profiles, related lists, and capabilities.

schema.description: Module metadata response containing complete configuration details for the requested CRM module.

modules.description: Array containing module metadata. Typically contains a single module object for GET by api_name.

items.description: Complete metadata for a CRM module including configuration, capabilities, fields, layouts, profiles, and related lists.

global_search_supported.description: Indicates whether this module supports global search functionality.

public_fields_configured.description: Indicates whether public fields have been configured for this module.

recycle_bin_on_delete.description: Indicates whether deleted records are moved to recycle bin instead of permanent deletion.

has_more_profiles.description: Indicates whether there are additional profiles beyond those returned in the response (pagination indicator).

sub_menu_available.description: Indicates whether this module has a submenu available in the UI.

lookupable.description: Indicates whether this module can be used as a lookup target by other modules.

profile_count.description: Number of profiles available for this module. 0 indicates module has no profile assignments. Maximum 203 profiles per module.

module_type.description: Classification of the module - ENTITIES for standard data modules, CONFIGURATION_ENTITIES for configuration/settings modules.

cc_enabled.description: Indicates whether CommandCenter functionality is enabled for this module.

deletable.description: Indicates whether records in this module can be deleted.

description.description: User-defined description of the module. Null when no description has been set; empty string not used.

source.description: Source or origin of the module configuration.

creatable.description: Indicates whether new records can be created in this module.

inventory_template_supported.description: Indicates whether this module supports inventory template functionality.

modified_time.description: Timestamp when the module configuration was last modified in ISO 8601 format with timezone offset (e.g., 2025-11-20T14:30:00+05:30). Null for modules never modified after initial creation.

presence_sub_menu.description: Indicates whether presence submenu is available for this module.

triggers_supported.description: Indicates whether workflow triggers are supported for this module.

id.description: Unique identifier for the module.

api_name.description: API name used to reference this module in API calls.

plural_label.description: Translated/localized plural display label for the module.

actual_plural_label.description: Database/system plural label (untranslated base value) for the module.

actual_singular_label.description: Database/system singular label (untranslated base value) for the module.

singular_label.description: Translated/localized singular display label for the module.

isBlueprintSupported.description: Indicates whether Blueprint (process automation) is supported for this module.

visibility.description: Bitwise feature visibility flags controlling module and feature visibility. Base value 1=VISIBLE (fully visible). Add flag values to hide features: 2=WEBUIHIDDEN, 4=TABMENU, 8=LOOKUP, 16=RELATEDLIST, 32=MULTISELECTLOOKUP, 64=MODULE_SETTING, 128=AUTOMATION, 256=TEMPLATES, 512=IMPORT, 1024=EXPORT, 4096=REPORT, 8192=API. Examples: 1=fully visible, 4612 (4+512+4096)=hides TabMenu+Import+Report, 14316=complex combination hiding multiple features.

convertable.description: Indicates whether records in this module can be converted to other module records.

editable.description: Indicates whether records in this module can be edited.

emailTemplate_support.description: Indicates whether email templates are supported for this module.

email_parser_supported.description: Indicates whether email parsing functionality is supported for this module.

filter_supported.description: Indicates whether filtering/custom views are supported for this module.

show_as_tab.description: Indicates whether this module is displayed as a tab in the UI.

web_link.description: Web link/URL associated with the module, if any.

viewable.description: Indicates whether records in this module can be viewed.

api_supported.description: Indicates whether this module is accessible via API.

quick_create.description: Indicates whether quick create functionality is available for this module.

generated_type.description: Type indicating how the module was generated - default for system modules, custom for user-created, subform for related subforms, etc.

static_subform_properties.description: Configuration for static subform fields within this module.

fields.description: Array of field references in the static subform

items.description: Field reference with API name and ID

api_name.description: API name of the field

id.description: Unique identifier of the field

feeds_required.description: Indicates whether activity feeds are required/enabled for this module.

scoring_supported.description: Indicates whether lead/contact scoring is supported for this module.

webform_supported.description: Indicates whether web forms can be created for this module.

arguments.description: Array of argument objects used to substitute parameters in web tab URLs (e.g., https://...&id=${Users.User Id}&name=${Users.First Name}). Duplicates allowed; order preserved for multi-occurrence parameters. Empty for non-web-tab modules.

items.description: Argument object containing name-value pair for URL parameter substitution

name.description: Argument key used in URL template.

business_card_field_limit.description: Maximum number of fields that can be displayed in business card view for this module (non-negative).

access_type.description: Access control type for the module - org_based for organization-wide access or team_based for team-specific access.

private_profile.description: Profile configuration for team-based access control. Populated only when access_type is 'team_based' with profile name and ID. Null for 'org_based' access modules.

name.description: Display name of the private profile.

id.description: Unique identifier of the private profile.

track_current_data.description: Indicates whether current data tracking is enabled for this module.

oneOf.description: User who last modified this custom view. Null for system views that have never been modified.

name.description: Name of the user who modified the custom view.

id.description: Unique identifier of the user who modified the custom view.

oneOf.description: Indicates that has never been modified.

profiles.description: List of profiles with access to this module

items.description: Profile reference with ID and name

id.description: Unique identifier of the profile.

name.description: Display name of the profile.

parent_module.description: Parent module reference for child/related modules (subforms, field trackers). Empty object {} for standalone modules; populated with api_name and id for modules with parent relationships.

api_name.description: API name of the parent module.

id.description: Unique identifier for the parent module.

$field_states.description: Available field states for dynamic field visibility and validation.

items.description: Field state identifier

business_card_fields.description: Fields displayed in business card view. Only exposed when 'business_card_fields' is included in the include parameter. Can be empty array, array of objects with api_name and id, or array of string API names.

oneOf.description: Field reference with API name and unique identifier

api_name.description: API name of the field

id.description: Unique identifier of the field

oneOf.description: Field API name

per_page.description: Default number of records displayed per page for this module.

oneOf.description: Property name identifier
Extended property object containing additional module metadata

$on_demand_properties.description: Properties that can be loaded on-demand rather than by default.

items.description: Name of an on-demand property that can be requested explicitly.

search_layout_fields.description: Fields shown in search result layouts.

items.description: Field reference with API name and unique identifier

kanban_view_supported.description: Indicates whether kanban view is supported for this module.

lookup_field_properties.description: Properties and configuration for lookup field behavior in this module.

kanban_view.description: Indicates whether kanban view is enabled for this module.

chart_view.description: Indicates whether chart view is enabled for this module.

chart_view_supported.description: Indicates whether chart view is supported for this module.

related_lists.description: Configuration for related lists (subforms and related modules) displayed within this module's detail view. Only exposed when 'related_lists' is included in the include parameter.

items.description: Related list configuration defining how related module records are displayed and managed within the parent module's detail view.

id.description: Unique identifier of the related list.

sequence_number.description: Display order sequence number for this related list.

display_label.description: Label displayed for this related list in the UI.

api_name.description: API name of the related list.

module.description: Module information for the related list.

name.description: System name of the related list.

action.description: Action URL or identifier for related list operations.

href.description: API endpoint href for fetching related list records.

type.description: Type of related list (e.g., standard, custom, lookup).

connectedlookupApiName.description: API name of the connected lookup field, if applicable.

field_enabled.description: Indicates whether the related list field is enabled.

customize_sort.description: Indicates whether sorting can be customized for this related list.

customize_fields.description: Indicates whether fields can be customized for this related list.

customize_display_label.description: Indicates whether the display label can be customized.

status.description: Visibility status of the related list.

sort_by.description: Field used for sorting records in this related list.

id.description: Unique identifier of the sort field.

api_name.description: API name of the sort field.

sort_order.description: Sort order for related list records (asc or desc).

fields.description: Fields displayed in this related list.

items.description: Field reference containing the API name and unique identifier of a field displayed in the related list.

id.description: Unique identifier of the field.

api_name.description: API name of the field.

visibility.description: Visibility setting controlling where this related list is shown or hidden in UI.

personality_name.description: Personality name for this related list configuration.

record_operations.description: Allowed operations for records in this related list.

edit.description: Indicates whether edit operation is allowed.

create.description: Indicates whether create operation is allowed.

bulk_edit.description: Indicates whether bulk edit operation is allowed.

delete.description: Indicates whether delete operation is allowed.

disassociate.description: Indicates whether disassociate operation is allowed.

assign.description: Indicates whether assign operation is allowed.

connectedmodule.description: API name of the connected module for many-to-many relationships.

linkingmodule.description: API name of the linking/junction module for many-to-many relationships.

parent_related_lists.description: Parent related lists if this is a nested related list. Null for top-level related lists.

items.description: Parent related list reference object containing API name and unique identifier

api_name.description: API name of the parent related list.

id.description: Unique identifier of the parent related list.

_layout_specific_properties.description: Properties specific to each layout configuration for this related list.

items.description: Layout-specific configuration object containing sequence number and layout reference for a related list in a particular layout

sequence_number.description: Display order of this related list within the layout

layout.description: Layout reference object identifying which layout this configuration applies to

name.description: Display name of the layout

id.description: Unique identifier for the layout

filter_status.description: Indicates the current status of filters for this module.

related_list_properties.description: Configuration and settings for related lists in this module.

oneOf.description: API name of the display field
Display field object with detailed properties

api_name.description: API name of the display field

id.description: Unique identifier of the display field

oneOf.description: No display field configured

display_field.description: Field used as the display name or title for records in this module. Can be a string (API name) or object with field details, or null if not configured.

layouts.description: List of layout configurations available for this module, ordered by relevance to profiles and record creation. Only exposed when 'layouts' is included in the include parameter.

items.description: Layout configuration object containing layout metadata, profile associations, and field arrangements.

has_more_profiles.description: Indicates whether additional profiles beyond those returned are associated with this layout.

created_time.description: Timestamp when layout was created in ISO 8601 format with timezone offset. Null for system-generated layouts.

oneOf.description: Timestamp when layout was last modified in ISO 8601 format with timezone offset. Null if never modified.
Indicates that has never been modified.

visible.description: Indicates whether the layout is visible and accessible to users.

source.description: The source or origin of the layout configuration.

id.description: Unique identifier for the layout.

name.description: Internal name of the layout.

api_name.description: API-accessible name identifier for the layout used in API requests.

display_label.description: User-friendly display label shown in the UI for this layout.

status.description: Current status of the layout (active, inactive, etc.).

show_business_card.description: Indicates whether business card view is enabled for this layout.

generated_type.description: Type classification indicating how the layout was generated (system, custom, etc.).

created_for.description: Identifier of the entity (user, profile, role) for which this layout was specifically created. Null if created for general use.

id.description: Unique identifier for the field.

required.description: Indicates whether the field is required during conversion.

name.description: Internal name of the Deals module.

SalesOrders.description: SalesOrders module reference for conversion target.

oneOf.description: User who last modified this custom view. Null for system views that have never been modified.

name.description: Name of the user who modified the custom view.

id.description: Unique identifier of the user who modified the custom view.

oneOf.description: Indicates that has never been modified.

profiles.description: List of user profiles that have access to this layout.

items.description: Profile configuration with default view settings.

default.description: Indicates if this is the default profile for the layout.

name.description: Name of the profile.

id.description: Unique identifier for the profile.

_default_view.description: Default custom view configuration for this profile.

name.description: Name of the default view.

id.description: Unique identifier for the default view.

type.description: Type of the view (e.g., list, kanban, canvas).

_default_assignment_view.description: Default view configuration for record assignment operations.

name.description: Name of the default assignment view.

id.description: Unique identifier for the default assignment view.

name.description: Name of the user who created the layout.

id.description: Unique identifier of the user who created the layout.

sections.description: Layout sections containing field groups and organization.

items.description: Section configuration with fields and display settings.

actions_allowed.description: Permissions indicating which actions are allowed on this layout.

edit.description: Indicates if the layout can be edited.

rename.description: Indicates if the layout can be renamed.

deactivate.description: Indicates if the layout can be deactivated.

set_layout_permissions.description: Indicates if layout permissions can be configured.

fields.description: Complete field metadata for all fields in this module. Only exposed when 'fields' is included in the include parameter and the service is creator.

items.description: Field metadata object containing properties, data type, and configuration.

custom_view.description: Custom view configuration defining filters, fields, and display settings for the module. Only exposed when 'custom_view' is included in the include parameter.

cross_filters.description: Cross-module filter configurations for advanced filtering across related modules.

items.description: Cross-filter criterion object defining filtering logic for related modules.

$modified_criteria.description: Indicates whether the custom view's filter criteria have been modified from their original state.

display_value.description: Human-readable display name for the custom view shown in the user interface.

system_name.description: System-assigned internal name for predefined views. Null for user-created custom views.

category.description: Category classification of the custom view (e.g., shared_with_me, created_by_me, shared_by_me).

created_time.description: Timestamp when custom view was created in ISO 8601 format with timezone offset. Null for system views.

oneOf.description: Timestamp when layout was last modified in ISO 8601 format with timezone offset. Null if never modified.
Indicates that has never been modified.

last_accessed_time.description: Timestamp when custom view was last accessed in ISO 8601 format with timezone offset. Null if never accessed.

name.description: Unique name identifier for the custom view.

created_by.description: User who created this custom view. Null for system-created views.

name.description: Name of the user who created the custom view.

id.description: Unique identifier of the user who created the custom view.

oneOf.description: User who last modified this custom view. Null for system views that have never been modified.

name.description: Name of the user who modified the custom view.

id.description: Unique identifier of the user who modified the custom view.

oneOf.description: Indicates that has never been modified.

module.description: Module reference indicating which module this custom view belongs to. Only exposed for client calls.

api_name.description: API name of the module.

id.description: Unique identifier for the module.

oneOf.description: Single filter criterion defining a field comparison condition.

comparator.description: Comparison operator used for filtering (e.g., equal, contains, greater_than, less_than).

field.description: Field reference specifying which field to filter on.

api_name.description: API name of the field to filter.

id.description: Unique identifier of the field.

type.description: type of the field being filtered.

value.description: Filter value to compare against. Can be boolean, string, number, object, array, or null depending on field type and comparator.

oneOf.description: No filter criteria applied.

default.description: Indicates if this is the default view for the module.

system_defined.description: Indicates if this view was created by the system (true) or by a user (false).

locked.description: Indicates if the view is locked and cannot be modified or deleted.

favorite.description: Favorite ranking position for the view. Null if not marked as favorite.

offline.description: Indicates if this view is available for offline access in mobile applications. Only exposed for crmmobile and routeiq services.

access_type.description: Access level for the custom view determining who can see it.

shared_to.description: List of users, roles, groups, or territories with whom this view is shared. Null for public or non-shared views.

oneOf.description: Share target with subordinates included.

subordinates.description: Indicates if subordinates of the specified entity are included in sharing.

type.description: Type of entity the view is shared with (territories, roles, groups, users).

name.description: Name of the entity (user, role, group, or territory).

id.description: Unique identifier of the entity.

oneOf.description: Share target without subordinates.

subordinates.description: Indicates if subordinates are excluded from sharing.

type.description: Type of entity the view is shared with (territories, roles, groups, users).

name.description: Name of the entity (user, role, group, or territory).

id.description: Unique identifier of the entity.

fields.description: List of fields to display in this custom view.

items.description: Field configuration specifying which field to show and display settings.

id.description: Unique identifier of the field.

api_name.description: API name of the field.

_pin.description: Indicates if the field is pinned in the view.

sort_by.description: Field used for sorting records in this view. Null if no specific sort field is configured.

id.description: Unique identifier of the sort field.

api_name.description: API name of the sort field.

sort_order.description: Sort direction for the view (ascending or descending). Null if no sort order is configured.

wrap_text.description: Indicates whether text wrapping is enabled for fields in this custom view.

id.description: Unique identifier for the custom view.

zia_view.description: Indicates whether Zia AI view is enabled for this module. Only exposed for Deals module.

default_mapping_fields.description: Default field mappings for module data import and integration operations. Only exposed for SALESORDERS, INVOICES, QUOTES, QUOTEDITEMS, ORDEREDITEMS, INVOICEDITEMS modules.

items.description: Field mapping configuration for import operations.

api_name.description: API name of the mapped field.

id.description: Unique identifier of the mapped field.

activity_badge.description: Activity badge configuration status for the module.

status.description: Current visibility status of the module in the system.

sequence_number.description: Module display ordering index in navigation/module list. Lower values appear first. Range 1-200.

$others_awaiting.description: Indicates whether there are other users awaiting action on records in this module. Only exposed for Approvals module.

territory.description: Territory assignment for the module. Null when territory management is not enabled.

name.description: Name of the territory (e.g., 'All Territories', 'North America').

id.description: Unique identifier for the territory. String representation of numeric ID; '0' indicates the special 'All Territories' territory.

showleadchainsync.description: Indicates if lead chain synchronization is enabled for this module. Only exposed for Leads module.

show_social.description: Indicates if social tabs features are enabled for this module.

show_visitor.description: Indicates if ZLiveDesk feature is enabled for this module.

show_googlesync.description: Indicates if Google Contact Sync feature is enabled for this module.

showtiktoksync.description: Indicates if TikTok LeadChain Sync feature is enabled for this module.

show_webform.description: Indicates if web forms feature is enabled for this module.

showfacebooksync.description: Indicates if Facebook LeadChain Sync feature is enabled for this module.

show_emailparser.description: Indicates if Email Parser feature is enabled for this module.

showlinkedinsync.description: Indicates if LinkedIn LeadChain Sync feature is enabled for this module.

masked_fields_count.description: Number of fields that are masked in this module. only exposed when field masking feature is enabled.

204.description: No Content - The requested module is not available for retrieval via this API endpoint. This occurs when the module exists in the system but is not exposed through the single module GET API (e.g., web tab modules, certain system modules). The module may still be accessible through the bulk modules API (GET /crm/v8/settings/modules). No response body is returned.

400.description: Bad Request - Syntactic validation failure (malformed or empty api_name parameter) or semantic error (module exists but not supported in API, API version incompatibility). Includes structured error codes: NOT_SUPPORTED (module not supported/invalid), API_NOT_SUPPORTED (API version incompatible), INVALID_REQUEST (malformed parameters).

oneOf.description: NOT_SUPPORTED error when the module is not supported in the API.

code.description: Error code indicating the module is not supported.

details.description: Details about the unsupported resource.

resource_path_index.description: Index of the invalid resource in the URL path (0-based). Typically 2 for the {api_name} parameter.

message.description: Human-readable error message explaining that the module is not supported.

oneOf.description: API_NOT_SUPPORTED error when the requested API version is not supported.

code.description: Error code indicating the requested API version is not supported.

details.description: Details about the supported API version.

supported_version.description: The minimum or recommended API version that supports this endpoint.

message.description: Human-readable error message explaining API version incompatibility.

oneOf.description: INVALID_REQUEST error when request parameters are malformed or have empty values.

code.description: Error code indicating an invalid request.

details.description: Additional details about the invalid request (typically empty).

message.description: Human-readable error message explaining the invalid request.

put.description: Partially updates a module's display labels (singular and plural) and associated profile permissions. This operation only modifies the specified fields without affecting other module configuration. The operation is idempotent - calling it multiple times with the same payload produces the same result.

requestBody.description: Module update payload containing the module ID, new labels, and profile assignments. Contains a single module in the array.

schema.description: Request payload for updating module configuration including labels and profile associations.

modules.description: Array containing a single module object to update.

items.description: Module configuration object containing labels and profile assignments to update.

singular_label.description: Singular display label for the module. Maximum 25 characters, alphanumeric and spaces only, no special characters allowed.

plural_label.description: Plural display label for the module. Maximum 25 characters, alphanumeric and spaces only, no special characters allowed.

id.description: Unique numeric identifier of the module to update. Must match an existing module. Numeric string representation of a 64-bit positive integer (Java long/DB bigint).

profiles.description: List of unique profile IDs that should have access to this module. Cannot be empty. Order not significant. Maximum 203 profiles allowed.

items.description: Profile assignment specifying which profile should have access to this module.

id.description: Numeric identifier of the profile. Numeric string representation of a 64-bit positive integer (Java long/DB bigint).

200.description: Module successfully updated. Returns the updated module ID and success confirmation.

schema.description: Response wrapper containing the result of the module update operation.

modules.description: Array containing a single success response object for the updated module.

items.description: Success response object containing operation result, module ID, and status.

code.description: Operation result code indicating successful update.

details.description: Details object containing the ID of the updated module.

id.description: Unique numeric identifier of the successfully updated module. Numeric string representation of a 64-bit positive integer (Java long/DB bigint).

message.description: Human-readable success message confirming the module update.

400.description: Bad Request - validation errors, invalid module, unsupported operation, or API version not supported. Returns specific error codes: INVALID_MODULE (module not found or path mismatch), INVALID_DATA (label exceeds 25 chars or contains special characters), API_NOT_SUPPORTED (API version incompatibility), MANDATORY_NOT_FOUND (mandatory field missing).

oneOf.description: INVALID_MODULE error when the module API name in the URL path is invalid or does not exist.

code.description: Error code indicating the module is invalid or not found.

details.description: Details about the invalid module reference.

resource_path_index.description: Index of the invalid resource in the URL path (0-based). Typically 2 for the {api_name} parameter.

message.description: Human-readable error message explaining the invalid module.

oneOf.description: INVALID_DATA error when request body contains invalid data (label too long or contains special characters).

modules.description: Array containing error details for each invalid module in the request.

items.description: Error object describing the invalid data.

code.description: Error code indicating invalid data in the request.

details.description: Details about the invalid field, including location and constraints.

maximum_length.description: Maximum allowed length for the field (only present for length violations).

expected_data_type.description: Expected data type for the field (only present for data type violations).

api_name.description: API name of the invalid field.

json_path.description: JSONPath location of the invalid field in the request body.

message.description: Human-readable error message describing the validation failure.

oneOf.description: API_NOT_SUPPORTED error when the requested API version does not support this endpoint.

code.description: Error code indicating the API version is not supported.

details.description: Details about the minimum supported API version.

supported_version.description: The minimum API version that supports this endpoint.

message.description: Human-readable error message explaining API version incompatibility.

oneOf.description: MANDATORY_NOT_FOUND error when a required field is missing or empty in the request body.

modules.description: Array containing error details for each module with missing required fields.

items.description: Error object describing the missing required field.

code.description: Error code indicating a required field is missing or empty.

details.description: Details about the missing required field and its location.

api_name.description: API name of the missing required field.

json_path.description: JSONPath location where the required field is missing.

message.description: Human-readable error message indicating the field is required.

oneOf.description: DUPLICATE_DATA error when a provided field value duplicates an existing one.

modules.description: Array containing error details for each module with duplicate field values.

items.description: Error object describing the duplicate value.

code.description: Error code indicating a duplicate value.

details.description: Details about the duplicate field and its location.

api_name.description: API name of the field with duplicate value.

json_path.description: JSONPath location of the duplicate field in the request body.

message.description: Human-readable error message indicating duplicate data.

oneOf.description: NOT_ALLOWED error when attempting to update a restricted field.

modules.description: Array containing error details for each module with disallowed updates.

items.description: Error object describing the not allowed update.

code.description: Error code indicating the update is not allowed.

details.description: Details about the restricted field and its location.

api_name.description: API name of the restricted field.

json_path.description: JSONPath location of the restricted field in the request body.

message.description: Human-readable error message indicating the update is not allowed.

oneOf.description: MINIMUM_DATA_NOT_FOUND error when a field is present but does not meet minimum data requirements (e.g., profiles array must contain at least one item).

modules.description: Array containing error details for each module failing minimum data checks.

items.description: Error object describing the minimum data violation.

code.description: Error code indicating minimum data not found.

details.description: Details about the field and its location failing minimum requirements.

api_name.description: API name of the field failing minimum requirement.

json_path.description: JSONPath location of the field in the request body.

message.description: Human-readable error message indicating minimum data not found.

ModuleIdentifier.name: moduleIdentifier
ModuleIdentifier.description: Identifier for the module to retrieve, either numeric ID or API name. Use numeric ID for precise identification or API name for human-readable reference. Case-sensitive when using API name.

oneOf.description: Unique numeric identifier. Numeric string representation of a 64-bit positive integer.

API name of the module to retrieve. Case-sensitive identifier following specific naming rules: must start with a letter, contain only alphanumeric characters and underscores, cannot have consecutive underscores, and must end with alphanumeric character.

Status.name: status
Status.description: Filter modules by their visibility status. Accepts comma-separated values to retrieve modules matching any of the specified statuses. Case-sensitive.

FeatureName.name: feature_name
FeatureName.description: Filter modules by feature name. Retrieves modules associated with the specified feature. Case-sensitive, follows snake_case format. Empty string returns 400 error.

Include.name: include
Include.description: Comma-separated list of additional fields to include in the response. Allows retrieving optional module metadata that is not returned by default.

scopes.ZohoCRM.settings.modules.ALL: Full access to module settings operations including read, create, update, and delete module configurations
scopes.ZohoCRM.settings.modules.READ: Read-only access to module settings operations including viewing module configurations
scopes.ZohoCRM.settings.modules.UPDATE: Access to update module settings operations including modifying module configurations
scopes.ZohoCRM.settings.modules.CREATE: Access to create module settings operations including adding new module configurations
